text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
What a spectacular view! The weather is nice and
the breeze feels great! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It reminds me of the park near my home. I used to
love singing my heart out while facing the open
landscape!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since I did that, so maybe I
should give it a shot.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeaaah! ♪ This feeling that fills me as I race
across the tuuurf! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that felt great! I should probably head back
to the academy soo—

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: No way! Practice started ages ago!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Kitasan Black misses practice
completely...
